_doc: Known-fake registry — content-hash → forced verdict. Bypasses statistical inference for content with established ground truth. In production this would be the on-chain blockchain provenance layer (§6 of JOURNAL_PAPER.md); this JSON file emulates it for demo/evaluation when no chain is registered.
_format: Each key is the SHA256 hex of the video bytes. Each value carries the override verdict + a human-readable reason that surfaces in the API response.
